name: Subterror Fiendess
name_jp: サブテラーの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>よう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Subterror" monster you control; negate the activation, then change the targeted monster to face-down Defense Position. You can target 1 face-up monster you control; change it to face-down Defense Position, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Subterror" monster from your hand or GY, in face-up or face-down Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Subterror Fiendess" once per turn.
mnst_eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Subterror" monster you control; negate the activation, then change the targeted monster to face-down Defense Position. You can target 1 face-up monster you control; change it to face-down Defense Position, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Subterror" monster from your hand or GY, in face-up or face-down Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Subterror Fiendess" once per turn.
eff: When your opponent activates a card or effect (Quick Effect): You can send this card from your hand or field to the GY, then target 1 "Subterror" monster you control; negate the activation, then change the targeted monster to face-down Defense Position. You can target 1 face-up monster you control; change it to face-down Defense Position, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Subterror" monster from your hand or GY, in face-up or face-down Defense Position. You can only use each effect of "Subterror Fiendess" once per turn.

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends itself from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
